/usr/bin/cc  -Werror -Wall -Wextra -g  -Werror -Wall -Wextra -g -O0 -arch arm64 -dynamiclib -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names -o ../libplugin-sc1.dylib -install_name @rpath/libplugin-sc1.dylib "CMakeFiles/plugin-sc1.dir/sc1.c.o"   -L/usr/local/lib  -Wl,-rpath,./ -Wl,-rpath,/usr/local/lib -Wl,-rpath,/Users/dannv/Workspace/SYSTEMS/emqx:clone/emqx-neuron/build-opcua-native ../../../libneuron-base.dylib /opt/homebrew/Cellar/openssl@3/3.6.2/lib/libssl.a /opt/homebrew/Cellar/openssl@3/3.6.2/lib/libcrypto.a -lnng -lzlog -ljansson -ljwt -lxml2 -lm -lprotobuf-c -lmbedtls -lmbedx509 -lmbedcrypto
